_description: Global booking settings and feature flags. Changing values here updates behaviour site-wide without touching JavaScript. occupancyPerRoom controls how many guests share a room when calculating room count. depositPercentage is the fraction of the total required as an advance deposit (0.3 = 30%). whatsappNumber is the international number (no + or spaces) used for enquiry links. Tax and service charge can be toggled on/off and their rates adjusted without code changes.

_futurePayments._note: Add payment gateway configuration here when online payments are introduced. Example keys: gatewayProvider, publicKey, supportedMethods.
